Guanethidine Sulfate

Guanethidine sulfate is a antihistamines and decongestants used to treat allergy symptoms and hay fever in adults and children. It is also used to treat hay fever in children and children with asthma.

Guanethidine sulfate is not approved for use by children under 2 years of age. It is not approved for use in pregnant women or women who are breastfeeding.

The oral liquid and oral tablet forms of guanethidine sulfate are available only by prescription from a pharmacy or doctor.
